query: SELECT bo.id, bo.businessName, COUNT(sm.id) as total_staff, SUM(CASE WHEN sm.localId NOT LIKE 'seed-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as user_staff FROM business_owners bo LEFT JOIN staff_members sm ON sm.businessOwnerId = bo.id GROUP BY bo.id, bo.businessName ORDER BY user_staff DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT bo.id, bo.businessName, COUNT(sm.id) as total_staff, SUM(CASE WHEN sm.localId NOT LIKE 'seed-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as user_staff FROM business_owners bo LEFT JOIN staff_members sm ON sm.businessOwnerId = bo.id GROUP BY bo.id, bo.businessName ORDER BY user_staff DESC LIMIT 10;
